title: Dashboard With Sidebar Navigation
description: ARCHETYPE: dashboard. Build a web app page at '/' with an app shell. The left sidebar MUST use explicit `nav section` and `nav item` syntax, not plain text rows. Need: at least 3 nav sections, at least 6 nav items, at least 3 items with `with count`, and at least 4 items with `with icon`. The main area should show a header plus a simple dashboard content section.
